pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which dynamically blanks the email fields for these specific users via the Access Commander API.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which dynamically blanks the phone fields for these specific users via the Access Commander API.
Verified by checking the union of users affected by setup_task.sh. seed_ac_data.py ensures all other created users have full contact details.

privileged_info_summary: The dataset used for this task is synthetically generated via seed_ac_data.py. By inspecting the environment setup scripts (setup_task.sh), it is verified that exactly five users have their contact information dynamically blanked out: Marcus Webb, Fatima Al-Rashid, and Tomás Guerrero are missing email addresses, while Leon Fischer, Fatima Al-Rashid, and Rachel Goldstein are missing phone numbers. No other users are missing contact details.
